vocab.meaning: tầm nhìn giám tuyển (cách sắp xếp và ý đồ của người tổ chức triển lãm)
vocab.example: I was deeply impressed by the curatorial vision, which seamlessly linked traditional folklore with modern digital art.

vocab.meaning: phong trào nghệ thuật tiên phong (đổi mới, táo bạo)
vocab.example: The gallery was dedicated to the avant-garde movement, showcasing pieces that challenged conventional social norms.
Viewing the original painting allowed me to appreciate the subtle nuances of color that a digital photograph simply cannot capture.
Modern installations often provide a multisensory experience, combining visual art with surround sound and scent.

vocab.meaning: kỹ năng nghệ thuật bậc thầy/điêu luyện
vocab.example: The sculptor’s artistic virtuosity was evident in the way he transformed cold marble into soft, realistic fabric folds.

vocab.meaning: sự sắp đặt cạnh nhau gây bối rối/lo lắng
vocab.example: The exhibition featured an unsettling juxtaposition of industrial waste and delicate natural flowers.
The oil paintings were executed on a monumental scale, covering entire walls from floor to ceiling.

vocab.meaning: gợi lên cảm giác hoài niệm
vocab.example: The black-and-white photography collection managed to evoke a sense of nostalgia for a city I had never even visited.

vocab.meaning: sự tương phản hoàn toàn/gay gắt
vocab.example: There was a stark contrast between the vibrant, chaotic brushwork of the foreground and the calm, muted background.

vocab.meaning: vượt qua các ranh giới văn hóa
vocab.example: The beauty of the abstract sculptures lies in their ability to transcend cultural boundaries and resonate with people worldwide.
